title: 333 UK release for August 25th 2014
wikitext:
[]: 3.33 UK release for August 25th, 2014!             Quote Post by weeminator24 » Fri Nov 29, 2013 10:56 pm UK release confirmed by Manga for March 31 in their new trailer for the English Dub http//www.youtube.com/watch?v=zI8pIQIo6Vw

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Sat Nov 30, 2013 12:24 am Why so long? Germany is getting it in December. That's almost a year AFTER the JPN Blu-Ray release.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Nov 30, 2013 2:50 am Because we get the Yanks' leftovers.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Sat Nov 30, 2013 4:15 am Remember - Germany got 2.22 earlier, too. (If the German licensor doesn't make a dub for it, that might be why... or maybe it's another instance of German efficiency)

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Sat Nov 30, 2013 4:39 am The german release has a dub. Just 12 more days!

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sat Nov 30, 2013 9:24 am My god do I love this movie, can't wait to actually own it...... In February

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Nov 30, 2013 10:18 am December for me biatches!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Nov 30, 2013 10:59 am Man I hate how western companies give away everything in the trailers.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sat Nov 30, 2013 11:12 am From what I heard there, Grant is actually tolerable. Huh.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Nov 30, 2013 12:35 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Man I hate how western companies give away everything in the trailers.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Nov 30, 2013 1:17 pm Well, after all, people need to know what they're getting, or they won't spend their money!

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Sat Nov 30, 2013 2:11 pm pwhodges wrote: Well, after all, people need to know what they're getting, or they won't spend their money!

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Nov 30, 2013 2:22 pm Ah, but the trailer they already have is misleading, so they could return the new film as not being as described!

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Sat Nov 30, 2013 2:54 pm Nah... you can't return a movie if you don't like it. And trailers shouldn't spoil a movie. There are many trailers that show the whole story. Those suck.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Nov 30, 2013 4:05 pm I jest... But UK consumer law is such that it might not be as hard as you think to argue that case!

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Nov 30, 2013 4:11 pm qu4d, I think that pwhodges is using British humor!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Nov 30, 2013 5:42 pm Chuckman wrote: From what I heard there, Grant is actually tolerable. Huh.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Sat Nov 30, 2013 8:42 pm Check out Tokyo Magnitude 8.0 if you really wanna be blown away. I don't think anyone would have EVER guessed that's her.

[]:             Quote Post by Black Swordsman » Sun Dec 01, 2013 7:41 am Why so long Nice that theres bonus goodies in there though.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sun Dec 01, 2013 8:21 am I love how at the end of the trailer The wrath of god in all its fury fades.
summary:
[]: 3.33 UK release for August 25th, 2014!             Quote Post by weeminator24 » Fri Nov 29, 2013 10:56 pm UK release confirmed by Manga for March 31 in their new trailer for the English Dub http//www.youtube.com/watch?v=zI8pIQIo6Vw

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Sat Nov 30, 2013 12:24 am Why so long? Germany is getting it in December. That's almost a year AFTER the JPN
